Clinical Adverse Event Report (Complete Case)
Patient Information:
Patient Name: Rajesh Kumar
Age: 52 years
Gender: Male
Adverse Event Details:
Adverse Reaction: Severe hypotension observed after medication
Onset Date: 12 March 2026
Drug Information:
Drug Name: Drug-X12
Dosage: 50 mg daily
Route: Oral
Reporter Information:
Reporter Name: Dr. Amit Verma
Hospital: AIIMS New Delhi
Contact: +91-9876543210
Regulatory Information:
Report Date: 15 March 2026
Ethics Approval: Approved
CDSCO Status: Ready for Review
Clinical Notes:
The patient developed severe hypotension within 48 hours of starting Drug-X12. Immediate
discontinuation was advised and supportive treatment was initiated. The patient responded
positively to treatment
